import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

import os
import json
import torch
import numpy as np
from PIL import Image
from tsr.system import TSR
from tsr.utils import get_ray_directions, get_rays, get_spherical_cameras
import torch.nn.functional as F
import math

# First, check what config keys exist
model = TSR.from_pretrained(
    '/models/triposr',
    config_name='config.yaml',
    weight_name='model.ckpt',
)
print('Config keys:', list(model.cfg.keys()))
print('Config:', model.cfg)

# Check TSR.render source to see how fovy is accessed
import inspect
print('\n=== TSR.render source ===')
print(inspect.getsource(model.render))
